zh.lifeSummary: 當Hellin de WAVRIN於1215年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦福林時，他的父親Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN25歲，母親Elisabeth de Morialmé26歲。他於1247年12月8日與Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1283年享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: WAVRIN
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Hellin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) probably a variant of   Hellen   (1). (ii) alternatively a variant of   Ellen  .

variants.name: Ellen
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Hellen
meanings: Of uncertain derivation, perhaps an altered form of Irish Kelan , or a shortened form of the Scottish surname McKellen (Gaelic Mac Ailein ‘son of Alan’ or Mac Cailein ‘son of Colin’).

en.lifeSummary: When Hellin de WAVRIN was born in 1215, in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN, was 25 and his mother, Elisabeth de Morialmé, was 26. He married Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN on 8 December 1247. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1283, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hellin de WAVRIN est né en 1215, à Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Morialmé, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN le 8 décembre 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1283, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hellin de WAVRIN 1215 in Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN 25 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Morialmé 26. Er hat am 8. Dezember 1247 Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1283 im Alter von 68 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hellin de WAVRIN è nato il nel 1215 nel Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Morialmé, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN il 8 dicembre 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1283, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hellin de WAVRINが1215年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Hellin Ier DE WAVRINは25歳，母Elisabeth de Morialméは26歳であった。1247年12月8日にJeanne Maria D'OLHAINと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1283年に68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hellin de WAVRIN(이)가 1215년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Morialmé(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1247년 12월 8일 Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1283년 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hellin de WAVRIN nasceu em 1215, em Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN em 8 de dezembro de 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1283, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hellin de WAVRIN родился в 1215 г. в местности ваврин, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Morialmé, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN 8 декабря 1247 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1283 г. в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hellin de WAVRIN nació en 1215, en Wavrin, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hellin Ier DE WAVRIN, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Morialmé, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jeanne Maria D'OLHAIN el 8 de diciembre de 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1283, a la edad de 68 años.
